tweets.text: Just got out of the studio. Very happy with the song I just recorded. No vocoder on it though. Missed opportunity? :o
I'm... cold.
Like 4 people just tried to convince me that saying "Nigger music is horrible" isn't racist. "I'm not saying it because they're black," Uh..
I just walked upstairs and saw a white rabbit walking around. I left it alone though. There's a reason for everything.
And I suppose I'll just go to sleep then.
Need to code something. What to code.
Read a little 10 Days That Shook The World and a little To Kill A Mockingbird; new bedtime ritual. They're both a little dry, so I combine.
heard the word "burrito" and immediately purchased a burrito

Drawing a little. I should be homeworking.

America is in a depressing state, but I take solace in the fact our president can actually express himself clearly.
Using a local git repo, not hooked up to GitHub, just for version management. First time I've done that. Another punch in my geek-card?
Having a reddit thread come up with like 5 extremely simple ideas that would make your product 1000x better means you didn't try.

Have felt like I needed to puke since I woke up. Wish my body would just get it over with already so I could go on with my day.

So, if you have layers inside layers, Illustrator just thinks that SVG IDs should no longer be layer names. It just ignores them.
Just your daily reminder that the way Illustrator handles SVG is straight-up retarded.
Miley Cyrus ebonics-thru-country-music-southern-accent accent is a sight to behold.
I almost always dislike SNL, but I always like the castmembers (off it)- I recognize it's importance in shaping comedians to be great.
Giving Saturday Night Live a try, even though I usually consistently hate it, because I trust in Beck Bennett and other new castmembers.
The Surface advertising sucks- but I will say that the musical theme they had written for it is awesome. Memorable, consistent, not cheesy.
